name: Wood
desc: You've already started while others are still deciding. Your mind works best in motion.

name: Fire
desc: You walk in, and the room shifts. You don't need to aim your light — it fills the space. What people remember isn't what you said. It's that you were there.

name: Earth
desc: Not the flashiest, but the one who shows up every day. You turn raw pieces into something that works.

name: Metal
desc: You have a built-in filter. You know instantly if it's good or not. When you approve, people trust it.

name: Water
desc: You go deep. Where others skim, you sink in. When you finally speak, you say what everyone else missed.
